appnote:
What's New in v5.13.0:
- You can now set content filtering on the app (admin parental control) to restrict mature-rated anime
- Content ratings now show on anime tooltips so you know the rating before watching
- Added a new video source (Bonk) for more streaming options
- Switching sources is now faster — the app auto-picks the fastest server for you
- Fixed multiple memory leaks and crashes on Android TV
- Videos now load and start playing faster thanks to optimized buffering
- Fixed an issue where the wrong anime could play when titles were similar
- Removed insecure network connections for better security
